0.text: Neural networks learn patterns through backpropagation and gradient descent

1.text: Random forests combine multiple decision trees for robust predictions

2.text: Transfer learning fine-tunes pre-trained models on domain-specific data

3.text: Batch normalization stabilizes training by normalizing layer inputs

4.text: Dropout randomly deactivates neurons to prevent overfitting

5.text: RAG retrieves relevant documents before generating a response

6.text: Vector embeddings capture semantic meaning in dense numerical form

7.text: Chunking splits large documents into smaller retrievable segments

8.text: Re-ranking reorders initial retrieval results using cross-encoders

9.text: Prompt engineering designs effective instructions for language models

10.text: Kubernetes manages containerized workloads with automatic scaling

11.text: Docker images package application code with all dependencies

12.text: CI/CD pipelines automate testing and deployment of code changes

13.text: Load balancers distribute traffic across multiple server instances

14.text: Message queues like Kafka decouple producers from consumers

15.text: Feature engineering creates informative variables from raw data

16.text: Data pipelines extract transform and load data between systems

17.text: Time series analysis detects patterns and trends in sequential data

18.text: Anomaly detection identifies unusual patterns that differ from normal behavior

19.text: A/B testing compares two variants to determine which performs better
